headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -20.6)
key_insights: Fears trending down 53% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Optimism leads today despite a sharply negative score of -39.8, driven by 49 quotes that skew heavily mild and moderate — strong quotes are scarce, keeping the score well below average.
• This sits in the lower half of Optimism's 185-day range (-65.2 to 23.2), signalling a notably subdued mood rather than outright collapse.
• Frustrations dropped dramatically from yesterday's high of 71.4 to just 5.9 today, even though 86 of its 133 quotes were strong-intensity — volume alone couldn't sustain the previous day's spike.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
